goal: Add a single-command real adapter M6-RC gate runner that chains the existing verified tools: real adapter artifact intake, live no-fake endpoint evidence capture with structured JSON sidecar, and M6-RC evidence verification. This phase must not claim M6-RC GO without an actual live adapter run; it only provides the deterministic runner and plan-only verification in the current no-adapter environment.
head: d3dfbc6
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC GO before live structured endpoint evidence exists
Weakening real adapter endpoint evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add the RC evidence runner, focused script tests, generated tooling evidence, WORKING.md handoff updates, and this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Runner plans and executes adapter intake before endpoint capture
Runner refuses to proceed when MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND is set
Runner redacts bearer token values from summaries
Runner does not claim M6-RC GO in plan-only or current missing-adapter environment
Current M6 verifier remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker
warnings: This gate does not provide a real trained adapter.
This gate does not run live Docker endpoint transcripts.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until the runner is executed with a verified real adapter, strict model cache, and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped runner gate that chains existing real adapter intake, endpoint capture, and M6-RC verification tools.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, CONTEXT.md, SSOT Phase 3-6 excerpts, M6 CTO decision, real adapter inference evidence, artifact intake tooling, endpoint capture tooling, M6 verifier, and existing training/export runtime code. The remaining M6-RC blocker is live no-fake endpoint evidence from a verified real CUDA lora_adapter.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/run_m6_real_adapter_rc_gate.py to chain adapter intake, live endpoint capture, and M6-RC GO verification. Added focused tests for command ordering, intake failure stop, plan-only no-execute behavior, fake-backend refusal, and token redaction. Updated WORKING.md and runner evidence.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused pytest, runner plan-only JSON, M6 verifier expected NOT_GO, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Runner tooling is complete. M6-RC remains NOT_GO because no real trained adapter live endpoint run was executed in this environment.

pabcd.approved_scope: RC evidence runner, focused tests, generated evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
